title: Portobello Bridge (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
Silver stars shine peacefully,
        The Canal is silver, the
        Poplars bear with modest grace
        Gossamers of silver lace,
        And the turf bank wears with glee
        Black and silver filigree.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Portobello Bridge (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
